title: Billing History

sourceLiteral.shape: static const List<(String label, String date, int amount)> — five hardcoded rows
sourceLiteral.note: No data-layer read at all. Rows are rendered inline via _BillRow (subscription_screens.dart:1018-1082). This is the only screen in the file whose provenance is fully 'inline'.

reads.description: A past billing/charge record. Real backend origin is IAP purchase history: auto-renewable subscription renewals (plan · interval, e.g. 'Market · monthly') AND consumable bundle purchases (messaging '150', AI credits '150') — see lib/data/billing/billing.dart (kPlans, kMessagingBundles, kAiCreditBundles). Store verifies receipts server-side; this is the reflected purchase ledger. As-built it is a 3-field display tuple, not a persisted model.

fields.name: label
fields.note: Combines the purchased product's display name with its interval (subscription) or quantity (consumable bundle). Real backend would derive this from a product/plan/bundle reference (productId + kind) rather than a free-text label.

fields.name: date
fields.asBuilt: preformatted display date e.g. '1 Jul 2026'; rows ordered newest-first
fields.note: Represents a real transaction timestamp; as-built it is a display-formatted String, not a machine date.

fields.name: amount
fields.asBuilt: whole-naira int (2500, 2000, 1200) — matches store prices in billing.dart (Market ₦2500, messages/150 ₦2000, ai/150 ₦1200)
fields.note: S-1: money is integer kobo on the wire/in DB in the target backend; UI divides by 100. As-built values are whole-naira. Rendered via formatNaira(amount) at subscription_screens.dart:1058.

filtersOrSort.asBuilt: rows are in reverse-chronological (newest-first) order as authored; no user-facing sort/filter control

reads.paginationNote: As-built a plain ListView of 5 const rows with no pagination affordance. A real (unbounded, growing) billing history would page under the project's cursor convention; not represented as-built.

actions.name: resendReceipt
actions.effect: showAppSnackbar 'Receipt sent to your email' — no network call, no download to device
actions.note: Per-row action against a single BillingTransaction. Special: receipts are emailed rather than downloaded in-app. No endpoint invented.

authContext.note: Billing/subscription is owner-only per conventions.md (staff cannot touch billing/payout/subscription).

special.downloadsNote: Receipt buttons are stub snackbars ('Receipt sent to your email'); footer copy states receipts are 'also sent by email' and purchases are made via the store (IAP mode) or Paystack. Treated as a download/receipt-delivery surface, though as-built it emails rather than streams a file.

uiStatesHandled.asBuilt: always renders the 5 const rows plus a footer note (subscription_screens.dart:1000-1007) that varies on kBillingMode (iap vs paystack)

uiStatesNote: Because data is inline const, no loading/empty/error states exist as-built; a real backed list would need them.

dependencies.note: billing.dart supplies plan/bundle catalogs (kPlans, kMessagingBundles, kAiCreditBundles) that the _rows labels/prices mirror, plus kBillingMode used only for the footer string. No billing.dart symbol is actually read by this screen at runtime.
